case_title: SAN FRANCISCO SCHOOL OF DIGITAL FILMMAKING, INC. VS. STEPHANIE VERA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO SCHOLL OF DIGITAL FILMMAKING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VERA, STEPHANIE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,565.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED THAT IT IS DUE UNPAID TUITION FORM DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2017 - JUDGMENT.
